text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even while Manhattan Cafe grapples with the
issues affecting her body, we manage to pass her
health check.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I think over our next steps, Manhattan
Cafe tells me she'd like to run in the Yayoi Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, her friend wants her to run alongside
Agnes Tachyon in the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she does well there, we can work our way up to
the G1. I accept Manhattan Cafe's request and
we set our sights on the Yayoi Sho.
